name: mcp-researcher
description: Python-native MCP server for academic research (arXiv search, paper reading, summaries, comparisons, literature briefs).

tools.name: search_arxiv
tools.description: Search arXiv and return normalized paper metadata (id, title, authors, abstract, dates, categories, PDF URL).

tools.name: read_paper
tools.description: Fetch metadata for an arXiv paper and optionally extract the full PDF text.

tools.name: summarize_paper
tools.description: Summarize a paper (abstract-first, full-text RAG when available) with key findings, methods and limitations.

tools.name: compare_papers
tools.description: Compare 2–5 papers side-by-side across method, dataset, results and limitations.

tools.name: build_literature_brief
tools.description: Produce a citation-backed literature brief on a topic, grouped by themes, methods and gaps.
